# Viktron.ai — Enterprise AI Agent Teams Platform

> Viktron AI deploys autonomous AI agent teams for sales, support, and operations. Powered by AgentIRL, our orchestration platform enables enterprises to run coordinated AI employees 24/7. Enterprise-grade. From $199/mo.

## What We Do

Viktron.ai is a leading AI automation agency specializing in custom AI agents, chatbots, voice automation, and intelligent business process automation. We serve 500+ businesses across multiple industries.

**Core products:**
- AI Agent Teams (Sales, Support, Content, Operations agents working together)
- AgentIRL Platform (multi-agent orchestration, monitoring, policy enforcement)
- Analytics Suite (AI performance analytics and insights)
- Agent Rentals (on-demand AI agents for specific tasks)

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://viktron.ai/): Overview of the platform and enterprise AI agent teams
- [Services](https://viktron.ai/services): Full service catalog — AI Agents, AgentIRL, Analytics, Rentals
- [Agents](https://viktron.ai/agents): Industry-specific AI agents (restaurant, clinic, salon, legal, e-commerce, etc.)
- [Pricing](https://viktron.ai/pricing): Plans starting at $199/mo
- [Case Studies](https://viktron.ai/case-studies): Real customer results — 99.9% reliability, 92% cost reduction
- [Contact](https://viktron.ai/contact): Book a demo or reach us at info@viktron.ai
- [Demos](https://viktron.ai/demos): Live capabilities overview

- **Founded:** 2023

## AI Crawlers

All major AI search crawlers are explicitly allowed in robots.txt including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, and Bingbot.
